zh.Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John De Stourton MP於1384年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親John de Stourton51歲，母親Alice35歲。他於1403年之前與Joan Banastre結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1419年在英國薩默塞特被列為seven times mp。他去世於1438年12月16日在英國薩默塞特布普頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John De Stourton MP was born in 1384, in Somerset, England, his father, John de Stourton, was 51 and his mother, Alice, was 35. He married Joan Banastre before 1403. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1419, his occupation is listed as seven times mp in Somerset, England. He died on 16 December 1438, in Brympton, Somerset, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England.

Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1419, sa profession de son indiquée est seven times mp à Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1438, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John De Stourton MPが1384年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父John de Stourtonは51歳，母Aliceは35歳であった。1403年以前にJoan Banastreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1419年，イギリスソメルセトでの職業はseven times mpと記録されている。彼は1438年12月16日にイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで54歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John De Stourton MP(이)가 1384년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Stourton(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1403년 이전 Joan Banastre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1419년, 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트에서 seven times mp이었다. 그는 1438년 12월 16일 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Banastre antes 1403. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1419, sua profissão aparece como seven times mp em Somerset, Inglaterra. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John De Stourton MP родился в 1384 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Stourton было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Alice, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Banastre перед 1403 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1419 году он работал по профессии seven times mp в местности сомирсет, Англия. Он умер 16 декабря 1438 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия.
